General.Name: Million Cities Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Million Cities Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, develops and sells properties in the People's Republic of China. The company primarily focuses on the development of affordable, luxury, residential, complex, and integrated properties in Huizhou. It also sells developed properties; leases developed and unsold developed properties; manages properties; and provides management advisory services. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Tai Po, Hong Kong. Million Cities Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Fortune Speed Investments Limited.
General.Address: Tai Ping Industrial Centre, Tai Po, Hong Kong
